allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initialize Petronas EMCAI project planning

- Create comprehensive PROJECT.md with vision, architecture, and success metrics
- Define detailed REQUIREMENTS.md (functional, non-functional, data, integration)
- Build 9-phase ROADMAP.md with 4-5 week timeline
- Establish config.json for workflow preferences
- Initialize STATE.md for project memory tracking

Next: Run /gsd:plan-phase 1 to begin development

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Build complete Petronas EMCAI Dashboard

Features implemented:
- 6 fully functional tabs (Overview, Inventory, Maintenance, Tools, AI Assistant, Reports)
- Real-time data integration with n8n webhooks
- Alert system (low stock, overdue audits, overdue tools)
- Interactive Plotly visualizations
- AI chatbot integration (GraphRAG)
- Report generation (CSV, Excel downloads)
- Advanced filters and search
- Sample data for demo mode

Technical stack:
- Streamlit frontend
- n8n backend integration
- Plotly charts
- Pandas data processing

Ready for deployment to Streamlit Cloud!

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(python -m pip install streamlit pandas plotly requests python-dateutil openpyxl --quiet)

Bash(git commit -m "Add deployment guide and testing files

- DEPLOYMENT.md with step-by-step Streamlit Cloud deployment
- test_import.py for verifying dependencies
- Complete deployment checklist for tomorrow''s presentation

Ready to deploy!")
Bash(git commit -m "Add quick start guide for immediate deployment")
Bash(py -m pip install streamlit pandas plotly requests python-dateutil openpyxl --quiet)

Bash(git commit -m "Update AI chatbot to support both POST and GET requests

- Auto-detect request method (tries POST first, falls back to GET)
- Handle async workflow responses
- Add helpful message when workflow is async
- Ready for both sync and async n8n configurations")

Bash(git commit -m "Improve AI chatbot to handle text and JSON responses

- Increased timeout to 60 seconds for AI processing
- Handle both JSON and plain text responses
- Better error messages for async workflows")
